2. ​The structure of 2-methylbutane is shown below. 
a) Draw the structures of all possible monochloro products resulting from the free-radical 
chlorination of 2-methylbutane. 
b) What do you expect the major product to be? Explain. 
c) How would the relative yield of the products differ if bromine was used instead of chlorine? 
 
 
 
 
3. S​how how each alcohol can be prepared from a combination of a carbonyl and a Grignard 
reagent 
  
 
 


=== PAGE BREAK ===

4. ​Show a mechanism for the reduction of butyrolactone using LiAlH​4​. 
 
 
 
5. Rank the carbonyls A-D below in order of decreasing electrophilicity (reactivity with 
nucleophiles).(1 = Most reactive).  Explain your reasoning.
